programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #10
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 中途島海戰:真實故事
programme.desc: 深入瞭解中途島海戰,大戰時雙方使用的飛機,以及一位戰鬥機機師的戲劇性故事,還有他在美國第一次太平洋戰爭獲得真正勝利中的關鍵作用.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 #3
programme.desc: 從巨型媒體帝國的女繼承人到被通緝的重犯,見證1974年的派蒂赫茲綁架奇案.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 #4
programme.desc: 以當時報導山姆之子的方式呈現事件,讓你沉浸在這謀殺案的戲劇中.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #5
programme.desc: 安斯利前往義大利西西里島的巴勒摩,並用上即捕的吞拿魚在海灘上準備海鮮麵食.他又品嚐了包括炸魷魚,釀沙甸魚和島上獨特香蒜醬的地道美食.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #6
programme.desc: 安斯利前往臺灣,發現它是世上最偉大的美食聖地之一.他發現香燉魚和辣炒豬肉,並用大蒜和辣椒煮臺灣大蝦.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #7
programme.desc: 安斯利發現馬德裡是個充滿秘密的城市.首先這個沉迷美食的城市禁止街頭美食.那麼當地人如何繞過這道禁令呢?

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #8
programme.desc: 安斯利來到摩洛哥,但他沒有去馬拉喀什或卡薩布蘭加,而是去了豐富多彩,混亂而夢幻的費茲.雜亂無序的麥地那是世界遺產,也是通往另一個時代的門戶.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #9
programme.desc: 安斯利到訪檳島首都喬治敦,馬來西亞人發現這個沉迷美食的國家中最好的街頭食品.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #10
programme.desc: 安斯利在美食之旅的最後一站到訪問約旦的安曼,那是來自伊拉克,黎巴嫩,巴勒斯坦和敘利亞中東一族叫作家的交匯處.

programme.title: 美國總統錄 #3
programme.desc: 巴拉克歐巴馬是首位非裔美國總統,體現了希望,正義,寬容和平等,以他的信息和傳承啟發數百萬人.

programme.title: 美國總統錄 #4
programme.desc: 探索比爾柯林頓複雜的影響,從阿肯色州起家到白宮的高山(經濟繁榮)與低谷(醜聞,彈劾),以及他對美國政治的影響.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #8
programme.desc: 安斯利來到摩洛哥,但他沒有去馬拉喀什或卡薩布蘭加,而是去了豐富多彩,混亂而夢幻的費茲.雜亂無序的麥地那是世界遺產,也是通往另一個時代的門戶.

programme.desc: 安斯利到訪檳島首都喬治敦,馬來西亞人發現這個沉迷美食的國家中最好的街頭食品.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #10
programme.desc: 安斯利在美食之旅的最後一站到訪問約旦的安曼,那是來自伊拉克,黎巴嫩,巴勒斯坦和敘利亞中東一族叫作家的交匯處.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #8
programme.desc: 安斯利來到摩洛哥,但他沒有去馬拉喀什或卡薩布蘭加,而是去了豐富多彩,混亂而夢幻的費茲.雜亂無序的麥地那是世界遺產,也是通往另一個時代的門戶.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #9
programme.desc: 安斯利到訪檳島首都喬治敦,馬來西亞人發現這個沉迷美食的國家中最好的街頭食品.

programme.title: 野外的一年:阿拉斯加 #2
programme.desc: 隨著春季來臨,日照變長,氣溫上升.不過,阿拉斯加只有短暫的春季.動物只有兩個月時間來覓食和組織家庭,還要避開獵食者.

programme.title: 野外的一年:阿拉斯加 #3
programme.desc: 阿拉斯加已進入夏季.這為世上最大規模之一的阿拉斯加三文魚遷徙準備了舞臺.

programme.title: 野外的一年:阿拉斯加 #4
programme.desc: 座頭鯨回歸阿拉斯加豐饒的食堂,三文魚則回到河流產卵.不過,牠們必須跟飢餓的棕熊討一條生路.

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #9
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #10
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 朋友與他們的產地 #1
programme.desc: 在聖露西亞,雙胞胎驚喜現身梅茜的度假之旅,帆船探險,叢林健行,極致享受的巧克力按摩,蘭姆酒品鑑,熱帶樂趣無限延伸!

programme.title: 朋友與他們的產地 #2
programme.desc: 在冰島,邦妮與雙胞胎展開史詩冒險--賞鯨,火山健行,策馬奔馳,還有極光下的深度環保對話.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 #4
programme.desc: 以當時報導山姆之子的方式呈現事件,讓你沉浸在這謀殺案的戲劇中.

programme.title: 生存邊緣 #1
programme.desc: 《生存邊緣》檢視全球生物圈所面臨的存亡威脅,以及對地球和奧特亞羅瓦(紐西蘭)的未來代表著甚麼.

programme.title: 生存邊緣 #2
programme.desc: 《生存邊緣》探索人類有史以來面臨的最大存亡風險之一的未來- 一個生化威脅.從病毒到人造流行病和合成生化武器,科技正加速人造威脅的風險.

programme.title: 巨型運輸:特別篇 #2
programme.desc: 這塊巨大的磁石將徹底改變世界和產能的未來.法國南部正建造目前世上最大的核融合反應堆.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #1
programme.desc: 重新檢視新春攻勢:兩個月的戰役殺死了超過15,000名美國和盟軍士兵,並引發了美國各地的反戰示威.探索報告,圖像和戰鬥片段,當中大部分自1968年以後就再沒出現過.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #2
programme.desc: 按時序再體驗太陽神13號險些釀成的災難,這是美國太空總署同時最具破壞性和最美好的時刻之一.通過新聞片段,任務控制的音頻和美國太空總署的存檔見證1970年4月的事件.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #3
programme.desc: 通過警察的音頻和視頻,還有當地及國家新聞報道,審 視2002年華盛頓特區的狙擊手襲擊事件.狙擊手為期三週的恐怖統治引發了美國史上最激烈,最複雜的搜捕行動之一.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #4
programme.desc: 透過罕見的檔案錄像審視民權社運人士麥爾坎X的迅速崛起和悲劇下場.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #5
programme.desc: 透過檔案錄像見證柯林頓總統被彈劾當天的故事.

programme.title: 美國總統錄 #5
programme.desc: 本紀錄片審視喬治小布希的總統任期,尤其是伊拉克戰爭,其後遺症以及他的決定帶來的持久影響,包括伊斯蘭國的崛起和衝突造成的傷亡.

programme.title: 美國總統錄 #6
programme.desc: 朗奴雷根是一位有魅力的領袖,他用列根經濟學將美國轉營,在國內外有著不同意見,又用他富有遠見的政策和標誌性的演講永遠改變保守主義.

programme.title: 野外的一年:羅莽湖 #3
programme.desc: 秋季是雄鹿爭相繁殖,魚鷹雛鳥開展3000英裡西非遷徙,三文魚返回牠們出生的河流,極北蝰產子的季節.

programme.title: 野外的一年:羅莽湖 #4
programme.desc: 冬天溫和潮濕,對不同動物來說,是好消息,也可以是壞消息.歐洲馬鹿被逼移到更高的地方,三文魚已經半年沒有食物,山兔變成了顯眼的白色,松鼠將自己的幼崽趕出巢穴.

programme.title: 紐西蘭美食故事 4 #5
programme.desc: Ben 搭船前往阿卡羅瓦的一座鮭魚養殖場,了解紐西蘭帝王鮭與大西洋鮭的不同之處.他親自捕撈鮭魚,並在俯瞰港灣的海岸邊烹調.他也介紹了一款高品質的本地食用油,兼具健康與多功能性,體現對本地農業與永續的承諾.

programme.title: 紐西蘭美食故事 4 #6
programme.desc: 正值核果盛產季節!Ben 造訪中奧塔哥一個由家族經營的果園,該果園以核果產季長,與土地及社區的緊密連結而聞名.他發現了一座全電力運作的櫻桃農場,將優質外銷櫻桃直接販售給紐西蘭民眾.

programme.title: 紐西蘭美食故事 4 #7
programme.desc: Ben 體驗魯阿佩胡地區正崛起的飲食文化,以及悠久的市集園藝歷史.他拜訪了一位第六代農夫,該農夫將一片偏遠荒野打造成繁榮的生態旅遊與高級餐飲目的地,並與一位屢獲殊榮的主廚合作.

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #1
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #2
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #5
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #6
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #8
programme.desc: 安斯利來到摩洛哥,但他沒有去馬拉喀什或卡薩布蘭加,而是去了豐富多彩,混亂而夢幻的費茲.雜亂無序的麥地那是世界遺產,也是通往另一個時代的門戶.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #9
programme.desc: 安斯利到訪檳島首都喬治敦,馬來西亞人發現這個沉迷美食的國家中最好的街頭食品.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #10
programme.desc: 安斯利在美食之旅的最後一站到訪問約旦的安曼,那是來自伊拉克,黎巴嫩,巴勒斯坦和敘利亞中東一族叫作家的交匯處.

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #7
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #8
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #9
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 印度美食之旅 #10
programme.desc: 森美拉發掘印度美食的起源.她尋找獨家和可靠的地方,說服廚師分享部分秘密,與街頭小販一起煮食,並浪蕩到古老的印度香料市場,帶你一瞥印度豐富的烹飪傳統,

programme.title: 朋友與他們的產地 #1
programme.desc: 在聖露西亞,雙胞胎驚喜現身梅茜的度假之旅,帆船探險,叢林健行,極致享受的巧克力按摩,蘭姆酒品鑑,熱帶樂趣無限延伸!

programme.title: 朋友與他們的產地 #2
programme.desc: 在冰島,邦妮與雙胞胎展開史詩冒險--賞鯨,火山健行,策馬奔馳,還有極光下的深度環保對話.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #8
programme.desc: 安斯利來到摩洛哥,但他沒有去馬拉喀什或卡薩布蘭加,而是去了豐富多彩,混亂而夢幻的費茲.雜亂無序的麥地那是世界遺產,也是通往另一個時代的門戶.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #9
programme.desc: 安斯利到訪檳島首都喬治敦,馬來西亞人發現這個沉迷美食的國家中最好的街頭食品.

programme.title: 街頭美食通 #10
programme.desc: 安斯利在美食之旅的最後一站到訪問約旦的安曼,那是來自伊拉克,黎巴嫩,巴勒斯坦和敘利亞中東一族叫作家的交匯處.

programme.title: 荒野生存之道 #1
programme.desc: 由牠們的齒與爪,到令人難以置信的隱身和狡猾,大自然最致命的掠食者進化出一系列令人震驚的狩獵技術.

programme.title: 荒野生存之道 #2
programme.desc: 我們在本集見證大自然最非凡的動物遷徙,並發現牠們為了生存而必須出走多遠.

programme.title: 荒野生存之道 #3
programme.desc: 動物嬰兒:為了嬰兒免受極端情況,飢餓掠食者和飢餓威脅,所有動物都必須為其物種的未來而戰.

programme.title: 巨型長毛象的足跡
programme.desc: 這具百萬年歷史的巨大杜爾福長毛象骨骸,急需進行世界首創的緊急修復.我們跟隨這個艱鉅的拆卸和重組脆弱化石的過程.透過電腦成像技術(CGI)和博物館知識,這部影片讓這個引人入勝卻鮮為人知的巨型生物重獲生命.

programme.title: 冰島:海鸚保護區
programme.desc: 討人喜歡,被視為滑稽的海鸚是冰島的國家象徵,但牠的命運令人擔憂.長達十年,海鸚伴侶停止繁殖.少數當地熱心人士現已動員起來,力挽狂瀾,拯救這種備受喜愛的海鳥.

programme.title: 洪堡涼流 #1
programme.desc: 在智利託雷斯德爾潘恩,雪山融水注入指狀峽灣,延伸至海洋並匯入洋流,降低海水鹽度.河口,濕地孕育眾多涉禽,而無數海灣與港口則吸引稀有的海豚與虎鯨.

programme.title: 洪堡涼流 #2
programme.desc: 洪堡洋流雖比多數洋流緩慢,卻是世界上最具活力的洋流之一,因其行經距離極長.深海海溝的湧升流將養分帶至海面,使浮遊植物大量繁盛,奠定複雜海洋食物鏈的基礎.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #3
programme.desc: 通過警察的音頻和視頻,還有當地及國家新聞報道,審 視2002年華盛頓特區的狙擊手襲擊事件.狙擊手為期三週的恐怖統治引發了美國史上最激烈,最複雜的搜捕行動之一.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #4
programme.desc: 透過罕見的檔案錄像審視民權社運人士麥爾坎X的迅速崛起和悲劇下場.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #5
programme.desc: 透過檔案錄像見證柯林頓總統被彈劾當天的故事.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 #3
programme.desc: 從巨型媒體帝國的女繼承人到被通緝的重犯,見證1974年的派蒂赫茲綁架奇案.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 #4
programme.desc: 以當時報導山姆之子的方式呈現事件,讓你沉浸在這謀殺案的戲劇中.

programme.title: 中途島海戰:真實故事
programme.desc: 深入瞭解中途島海戰,大戰時雙方使用的飛機,以及一位戰鬥機機師的戲劇性故事,還有他在美國第一次太平洋戰爭獲得真正勝利中的關鍵作用.

programme.title: 非洲的空中歷險 #1
programme.desc: 沿著非洲南部海岸觀賞古老的海蝕洞,現代的高爾夫球場,神秘的地質構造和危險的掠食者.

programme.title: 非洲的空中歷險 #2
programme.desc: 從空中俯瞰南非的山脈,繁囂的都市和野性難馴的動物.這是南非從史前骨頭到現代摩天大廈的旅程.

programme.title: 非洲的空中歷險 #3
programme.desc: 翱翔於廣闊的沙漠,巨大的鑽石和 世上最大的內陸綠洲之上.

programme.title: 非洲的空中歷險 #4
programme.desc: 從數千英尺高空探索西開普省迷人的海岸線,注目的山脈和多樣性的大都會.

programme.title: 非洲的空中歷險 #5
programme.desc: 要觀察這片充滿地質現象的土地,只能從高空欣賞其雄偉的真面貌.從散佈在海岸線上被遺忘的沉船到卡奧科蘭無解的仙女圈,納米比亞的秘密將被揭開.

programme.title: 非洲的空中歷險 #6
programme.desc: 在豐富多彩的非洲國家-尚比亞上空翱翔.包括世上最富有的人所打造的城市和擠滿世上最貧窮的人的市場.

programme.title: 中途島海戰:真實故事
programme.desc: 深入瞭解中途島海戰,大戰時雙方使用的飛機,以及一位戰鬥機機師的戲劇性故事,還有他在美國第一次太平洋戰爭獲得真正勝利中的關鍵作用.

programme.title: 消失的錄影帶 2 #3
programme.desc: 通過警察的音頻和視頻,還有當地及國家新聞報道,審 視2002年華盛頓特區的狙擊手襲擊事件.狙擊手為期三週的恐怖統治引發了美國史上最激烈,最複雜的搜捕行動之一.

programme.title: 野外的一年:阿拉斯加 #2
programme.desc: 隨著春季來臨,日照變長,氣溫上升.不過,阿拉斯加只有短暫的春季.動物只有兩個月時間來覓食和組織家庭,還要避開獵食者.

programme.title: 野外的一年:阿拉斯加 #3
programme.desc: 阿拉斯加已進入夏季.這為世上最大規模之一的阿拉斯加三文魚遷徙準備了舞臺.

programme.title: 野外的一年:阿拉斯加 #4
programme.desc: 座頭鯨回歸阿拉斯加豐饒的食堂,三文魚則回到河流產卵.不過,牠們必須跟飢餓的棕熊討一條生路.

programme.title: 野外的一年:羅莽湖 #3
programme.desc: 秋季是雄鹿爭相繁殖,魚鷹雛鳥開展3000英裡西非遷徙,三文魚返回牠們出生的河流,極北蝰產子的季節.

programme.title: 野外的一年:羅莽湖 #4
programme.desc: 冬天溫和潮濕,對不同動物來說,是好消息,也可以是壞消息.歐洲馬鹿被逼移到更高的地方,三文魚已經半年沒有食物,山兔變成了顯眼的白色,松鼠將自己的幼崽趕出巢穴.

programme.title: 巨型長毛象的足跡
programme.desc: 這具百萬年歷史的巨大杜爾福長毛象骨骸,急需進行世界首創的緊急修復.我們跟隨這個艱鉅的拆卸和重組脆弱化石的過程.透過電腦成像技術(CGI)和博物館知識,這部影片讓這個引人入勝卻鮮為人知的巨型生物重獲生命.

programme.title: 冰島:海鸚保護區
programme.desc: 討人喜歡,被視為滑稽的海鸚是冰島的國家象徵,但牠的命運令人擔憂.長達十年,海鸚伴侶停止繁殖.少數當地熱心人士現已動員起來,力挽狂瀾,拯救這種備受喜愛的海鳥.

programme.title: 野外的一年:羅莽湖 #3
programme.desc: 秋季是雄鹿爭相繁殖,魚鷹雛鳥開展3000英裡西非遷徙,三文魚返回牠們出生的河流,極北蝰產子的季節.

programme.title: 野外的一年:羅莽湖 #4
programme.desc: 冬天溫和潮濕,對不同動物來說,是好消息,也可以是壞消息.歐洲馬鹿被逼移到更高的地方,三文魚已經半年沒有食物,山兔變成了顯眼的白色,松鼠將自己的幼崽趕出巢穴.

programme.title: 荒野英雄 #4
programme.desc: 大象團隊在今集迎來令人震驚的消息,獸醫們擔心他們救助的一隻小企鵝,我們也瞭解到如何真正需要一個社區來為動物園提供食物.

programme.title: Zoo Vet At Large
programme.desc: Dr. Matt must deal with his greatest fear -V a tarantula. But he's forced to hide his phobia, as he demonstrates handling techniques to help local students overcome their worries.

programme.title: ...Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: We've got monkey criminals, magic and mirrors, cheeky monkeys, monkey pals, banana loving primates, baby monkeys, monkeys vs cameras, monkeys out on the town, and monkeys acting like us humans.

programme.title: Cute Pets At Home
programme.desc: The Japanese animated film My Neighbor Totoro, which is popular all over the world is the childhood memory of many. Totoro's classic furry body, round eyes and cute expression are very endearing. In South America, there is a kind of chinchilla that looks very similar to Totoro in the film. I heard that Taiwan now allows legal imports of these animals for breeding! Today, let’s follow the Totoro zoo owner Molly and fall in love with the soft and cute charm of this animation star!

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In the West Midlands a local vet has reported serious concern for a young dog that's recently left her surgery. The owners had refused to let the vets properly treat little Lola even though she had quite severe injuries. Inspector Herchy Boal has been called to help track down the owners and as it's such a young puppy it's critical Herchy finds her before it's too late.

programme.title: My House And Other Animals
programme.desc: Meet the modern-day Dr Doolittles with a passion for all creatures great and small: the unsung heroes of the wildlife world, whose homes have become havens for every animal imaginable.

programme.title: Best Of Pets
programme.desc: Another episode of Best of Pets with funny pet clips.

programme.title: Cute Pet Guide
programme.desc: The era of high housing prices shocks the masses. However, some are willing to live in the mountains for their beloved parrots, just to give them the best breeding environment. Parrots have a long lifespan and their IQ is comparable to that of a five-year-old child. How do you make them behave? Training is actually a good way, but how? "Melon seeds" are key to the goal. If you want to raise a parrot, there are in fact many restrictions on choosing the right one. How should I put it? Don’t miss “Cute Pet Guide”!

programme.desc: Dr. Matt must deal with his greatest fear -V a tarantula. But he's forced to hide his phobia, as he demonstrates handling techniques to help local students overcome their worries.

programme.title: ...Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: We've got monkey criminals, magic and mirrors, cheeky monkeys, monkey pals, banana loving primates, baby monkeys, monkeys vs cameras, monkeys out on the town, and monkeys acting like us humans.

programme.title: Cute Pets At Home
programme.desc: The Japanese animated film My Neighbor Totoro, which is popular all over the world is the childhood memory of many. Totoro's classic furry body, round eyes and cute expression are very endearing. In South America, there is a kind of chinchilla that looks very similar to Totoro in the film. I heard that Taiwan now allows legal imports of these animals for breeding! Today, let’s follow the Totoro zoo owner Molly and fall in love with the soft and cute charm of this animation star!

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In the West Midlands a local vet has reported serious concern for a young dog that's recently left her surgery. The owners had refused to let the vets properly treat little Lola even though she had quite severe injuries. Inspector Herchy Boal has been called to help track down the owners and as it's such a young puppy it's critical Herchy finds her before it's too late.

programme.title: My House And Other Animals
programme.desc: Meet the modern-day Dr Doolittles with a passion for all creatures great and small: the unsung heroes of the wildlife world, whose homes have become havens for every animal imaginable.

programme.title: Best Of Pets
programme.desc: Another episode of Best of Pets with funny pet clips.

programme.title: Cute Pet Guide
programme.desc: The era of high housing prices shocks the masses. However, some are willing to live in the mountains for their beloved parrots, just to give them the best breeding environment. Parrots have a long lifespan and their IQ is comparable to that of a five-year-old child. How do you make them behave? Training is actually a good way, but how? "Melon seeds" are key to the goal. If you want to raise a parrot, there are in fact many restrictions on choosing the right one. How should I put it? Don’t miss “Cute Pet Guide”!

programme.title: ...Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: we'll be seeing the best penguin fails, p-p-p-party penguins, we'll get up close and personal with wild animals, and we'll go on safari. we'll also meet angry animals living the thug life, some crazy critters, and we'll watch sporty animals in action.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In the West Midlands Inspector Herchy Boal receives an anonymous call about a labradoodle who is reportedly underweight with infected ears and dirty matted fur. It's up to Herchy to get to the bottom of this reported neglect.

programme.title: Best Of Pets
programme.desc: Another episode of Best of Pets with funny pet clips.

programme.title: Cute Pet Guide
programme.desc: The meerkat king from "Madagascar" is funny, but meerkats in real life are well-behaved, cuddly and they heal our hearts! Pocket sized pets are currently all the rage, but there are details you need to pay attention to when raising them. For example, hedgehogs are highly defensive, timid sugar gliders will harm themselves without being next to their owners, and cute guinea pigs like Norman from the movie "The Secret Life of Pets" are easily abandoned due to being easy to obtain and raise, etc. Don't worry, experts will teach you how to raise them! Come to a restaurant in Kaohsiung to get up close with Rocket Raccoon from “The Avengers”!

programme.title: Zoo Vet At Large
programme.desc: Dr. Matt is asked by a local cat charity to treat a litter of tiny abandoned kittens. They're so weak, it's touch and go whether any of them will survive.

programme.title: Scruffts
programme.desc: Six dogs, six handlers, all competing in the world’s largest and most famous dog show: "Crufts".But they are not the pedigree pooches who compete to be labelled "Best in Show". These are the loveable family pets competing to win the "Scruffts" title.

programme.title: Have A Pet Day
programme.desc: Renowned Golden Bell awarded host Sandy Wu takes her beloved dog Hershey on outings, inviting celebrities and their adorable pets to join in the fun. Beyond exploring nature, the show delves into heartfelt conversations about the journey of pet ownership and shares touching stories amid delightful scenery and cuisine. The program features various enjoyable activities where owners and pets can bond, creating unforgettable memories through laughter and tears.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In Essex Animal Collection officer Joe White's on his way to pick up a dog that's been left abandoned and tethered to the edge of a bridge. Last year the charity received over 63,000 reports of abandoned animals, and nearly half of those were dogs. When Joe arrives in Harlow, the lady who found the dog has moved him to a place of safety and is waiting with a couple of concerned neighbours. With his bones clearly visible through his already skinny frame, the poor dog is worryingly thin. But a lack of food isn't all that's wrong, there are scars on his face and body that suggest he's been through a hard youth. To try and piece together the dog's history Joe needs all the information he can gather.

programme.title: Cute Pets At Home

programme.title: ...Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: From the funniest feline fails, to the cutest of kittens we've dug out the very best the internet has to offer, and we've the cream of the crop right here.

programme.title: Cute Pet Guide
programme.desc: The charm of cute rabbits is irresistible! An old man raised hundreds of rabbits?! Playful little rabbits are spoiled yet timid! What should beginners pay attention to when raising rabbits?! Shocking! Rabbits can be poisoned by eating carrots?! Rabbits have a very bad temper?! They kick people they don't like?! Crazy about rabbits! Caregivers takes care of the little rabbits "wholeheartedly"?!

programme.title: Zoo Vet At Large
programme.desc: At Flamingoland, Oscar the male ostrich has been limping and Dr. Matt is determined to find out why.

programme.title: Scruffts
programme.desc: Six dogs, six handlers, all competing in the world’s largest and most famous dog show: "Crufts".But they are not the pedigree pooches who compete to be labelled "Best in Show". These are the loveable family pets competing to win the "Scruffts" title.

programme.title: Cute Pets At Home
programme.desc: Samoyed dogs, known as "smiling angels" are in fact not easy to raise. They require enough love and dedication, especially extraordinary physical strength!!! For you to be happy and healthy with them.If you want to raise a Samoyed, or already own one, we hope you can give them the best care and love, and make them your best partners. Come and jot notes of the hard work and tears shared by expert owners :)!

programme.title: ...Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: We've scoured the internet clean to bring you the most entertaining puppy clips out there: overexcited pups, pilfering pups, pups who fall asleep in their dinner bowls, puppy vloggers, driving pups, and even a look at the latest craze: pups who go into a quivering frenzy at the sight of-K doorstoppers.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In the UK nearly a quarter of the adult population have made a dog part of their family. But there are some reports RSPCA inspectors respond to that have them thinking otherwise, and in Staffordshire Inspector Charlotte Melvin is left reeling from the shock of what she finds when she investigates one such case. She receives a complaint about a house full of animals, some in cages and living in cramped and dirty conditions. When she arrived things looked so bad that Charlotte calls the police who help her gain access to the property. Inside there's a menagerie of different creatures, from a fox to a snake, to a lizard, all suffering in totally unsuitable quarters. Two of the worst affected are dogs Mocha and Lexi. Mocha has extreme hair loss. As well as having the same terrible skin problems as Mocha, Lexi is also severely emaciated. Charlotte must act fast to help all the animals to survive.

programme.title: Cute Pet Guide
programme.desc: Fishes swim in the water. What a healing thing it would be to be able to look at the blue ocean every day if we can own an underwater world at home! How can one be the creator of the underwater world? Moreover, in this small ecosystem, most players are male and they even jokingly describe each other as "going underwater"; "Cute Pet Guide" takes you to appreciate the mystery of "going underwater"!

programme.title: Best Of Pets
programme.desc: Another episode of Best of Pets with funny pet clips.

programme.title: Taiwan - Land of Discovery
programme.desc: Hayley Sparkes has a relaxing morning at the Confucius Temple, before heading to the mountains to have tea with the indigenous tribes. The day ends in a magnificent cherry blossom orchard.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters
programme.desc: The boys are on the road and rolling into the Finger Lakes. Ride along with them as they hit wineries, sample the local cuisine, experience the culture, and live the high life in upstate New York!

programme.title: The Boat Show
programme.desc: Luxury sailing, power boats, water sports and a nautical lifestyle. This show is for anyone who dreams of owning a vboat, of a life aboard ship, of beautiful people and places, and super yachts.

programme.title: Ellen's American Adventure
programme.desc: Ellen Coughlan continues her journey through New York State. In the centre of the State Ellen experiences 3 very different breweries, whilst also taking in some amazing waterfalls and a spot of diamond hunting.

programme.title: Cork Screwed
programme.desc: David Johnson and Louise Engel are perfect hosts for Ralph and Pat as they teach them about the ‘birds and the lambs’- utilizing animals in the farming process. Louise hits the vineyard and showcases the farm’s Riesling grapes while David quenches the guys’ thirst for knowledge (and wine), capping it all off with their brick pizza oven!

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Located on the ancient Silk Road, Dunhuang Oasis was the epicenter of an amazing discovery at the turn of the century. Taoist monk Wang Yuan Lu, who was appointed to care for a Buddhist holy place, was displeased with his position. A fateful sweep of the broom revealed a secret cache of thousands of Buddhist scrolls, unlocking the secrets held within the Sutra Cave. Over 50,000 artifacts, murals, statues, idols spanning the history of 12 different Chinese Dynasties were discovered. News of the find led to the discovery of the Mogao Grottoes by a British explorer who was surveying the ruins in the area. Fascinated by the find, Sir Marc Aurel Stein led the first of several foreign expeditions who bargained with the monk for these priceless artifacts, leaving the Mogao Grottos nearly empty. To this day, China is still heart broken at the loss.

programme.title: Amazing Spa Towns Of Europe
programme.desc: Ellen visits the Roman spa town of Acqui Terme, braving boiling water and atrocious odours. She greets a parade of Ferrari’s, and the thunder roars as she descends into a bizarre modern mausoleum.

programme.title: It's More Fun in the Philippines
programme.desc: After an early morning dolphin watching trip, Liü and Mel visit some mountain waterfalls. Mel faces a daunting cliff jump; they visit a faith healer, and have dinner on the beach with fire-eaters!

programme.title: Taiwan - Land of Discovery
programme.desc: Hayley Sparkes has a relaxing morning at the Confucius Temple, before heading to the mountains to have tea with the indigenous tribes. The day ends in a magnificent cherry blossom orchard.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters
programme.desc: The boys are on the road and rolling into the Finger Lakes. Ride along with them as they hit wineries, sample the local cuisine, experience the culture, and live the high life in upstate New York!

programme.title: The Boat Show
programme.desc: Luxury sailing, power boats, water sports and a nautical lifestyle. This show is for anyone who dreams of owning a vboat, of a life aboard ship, of beautiful people and places, and super yachts.

programme.title: Ellen's American Adventure
programme.desc: Ellen Coughlan continues her journey through New York State. In the centre of the State Ellen experiences 3 very different breweries, whilst also taking in some amazing waterfalls and a spot of diamond hunting.

programme.title: Cork Screwed
programme.desc: David Johnson and Louise Engel are perfect hosts for Ralph and Pat as they teach them about the ‘birds and the lambs’- utilizing animals in the farming process. Louise hits the vineyard and showcases the farm’s Riesling grapes while David quenches the guys’ thirst for knowledge (and wine), capping it all off with their brick pizza oven!

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Located on the ancient Silk Road, Dunhuang Oasis was the epicenter of an amazing discovery at the turn of the century. Taoist monk Wang Yuan Lu, who was appointed to care for a Buddhist holy place, was displeased with his position. A fateful sweep of the broom revealed a secret cache of thousands of Buddhist scrolls, unlocking the secrets held within the Sutra Cave. Over 50,000 artifacts, murals, statues, idols spanning the history of 12 different Chinese Dynasties were discovered. News of the find led to the discovery of the Mogao Grottoes by a British explorer who was surveying the ruins in the area. Fascinated by the find, Sir Marc Aurel Stein led the first of several foreign expeditions who bargained with the monk for these priceless artifacts, leaving the Mogao Grottos nearly empty. To this day, China is still heart broken at the loss.

programme.title: Amazing Spa Towns Of Europe
programme.desc: Ellen visits the Roman spa town of Acqui Terme, braving boiling water and atrocious odours. She greets a parade of Ferrari’s, and the thunder roars as she descends into a bizarre modern mausoleum.

programme.title: It's More Fun in the Philippines
programme.desc: After an early morning dolphin watching trip, Liü and Mel visit some mountain waterfalls. Mel faces a daunting cliff jump; they visit a faith healer, and have dinner on the beach with fire-eaters!

programme.title: Taiwan - Land of Discovery
programme.desc: After climbing a mountain before sunrise, Hayley Sparkes takes a boat ride across the mysterious Sun Moon Lake, and delves deeper into a land of mountains, canyons and a rickety suspension bridges.

programme.title: The Loop
programme.desc: A small discovery leads two adventures to clime the cliffs of their home island and make unexpected discoveries.

programme.title: The Boat Show
programme.desc: Luxury sailing, power boats, water sports and a nautical lifestyle. This show is for anyone who dreams of owning a vboat, of a life aboard ship, of beautiful people and places, and super yachts.

programme.title: Ellen's American Adventure
programme.desc: Ellen Coughlan is exploring New York State and is currently heading North, close to Canada. It’s all fun and games at the Strong’s Toy museum and stunning beauty amongst the 1000 islands.

programme.title: Amazing Spa Towns Of Europe
programme.desc: Ellen moves on to Marienbad, in the Czech Republic, to learn why it became a royal favourite. After bathing in a King’s bathtub, she’s serenaded by a singing fountain, and braves a shaky cable car ride.

programme.title: Cork Screwed
programme.desc: Steeped history, Henry of Pelham Estate Winery is owned and operated by three brothers, descendants of the original farm owner, Henry of Pelham. Paul, Matt and Dan take the guys on a tour of the property explaining their family history, the farm and award-winning Baco Noir, which they pair beautifully with flank steak.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: An age old sketching of plans for an imperial garden design drew the attention of two prominent Chinese architectural scholars. Upon further examination, they were shocked to discover he sketch’s true origins and exactly what the blueprints depicted. In their quest for more information, they unraveled the secret methods of construction for the world’s largest palace complex: The Forbidden City. From the blueprints, to small scale models, to the ingenious construction solutions conceived which brought a family, generations of success and wealth. Discover China delves into the foundations of how this impressive palace is constructed and provide detailed examination of Imperial Architectural Designs.

programme.desc: After surviving her most challenging trek into tribal lands, Hayley Sparkes travels north to explore the region around the capital Taipei, including a gold mine and the world’s second tallest tower.

programme.title: Into Water & Beyond
programme.desc: The beautiful paradise known as the Cook Islands. Whether it’s food, culture, romance or relaxation, the Cooks offer a real banquet of experiences and we show you diving, game fishing and some of the other things to do around the water.

programme.title: I Love St.Lucia
programme.desc: Discover the magic of the Caribbean island of St. Lucia with Lee John from imagination

programme.title: Summer In The Black Forest
programme.desc: The Black Forest is a land of fairy tales, legends, and of course, gateaux, right? Well Liu Batchelor is on a mission to find out, and uncovers many diverse and unusual tourist options along the way.

programme.title: The Boat Show
programme.desc: Luxury sailing, power boats, water sports and a nautical lifestyle. This show is for anyone who dreams of owning a vboat, of a life aboard ship, of beautiful people and places, and super yachts.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Looming across northern China, The Great Wall sits atop the crests, ridges and mountain tops, sprawling like a slumbering dragon. Through the ages, it has been stormed by marauding Mongolians, hailed as the ultimate defensive wall, and is one of China’s most magnificent accomplishments and first iconic image. The Great Wall has witnessed the waxing and waning of numerous dynasties and outcomes of many historic transformations. Its secrets of construction are still being uncovered, as well as revealing the stories left behind by those who constructed it. The generations, in an age where The Great Wall no longer serves its purpose, enjoys a life peace in a once threatened nation. Discover China marches across the great wall’s Wartorn Frontiers.

programme.title: Amazing Spa Towns Of Europe
programme.desc: Ellen’s welcomed to the glorious Czech town of Karlovy Vary with a curious underground tour, and a red-hot water jet, before staying in a hotel from a James Bond film, and taking a scary zip line ride.

programme.title: It's More Fun in the Philippines
programme.desc: After a morning visiting some of the indigenous communities, to learn their traditional skills, Liü and Mel have an amazing welcome from a mayor, and cross to a new island for a cycling adventure.

programme.title: Our New Zealand Escape
programme.desc: Robbie Magasiva and Natalie Medlock fly to Taupo and experience a life-changing moment with a hot waterfall.

programme.title: Into Water & Beyond
programme.desc: Lady Elliot is a small coral cay on the southern part of the Great Barrier Reef. The Island is made up of coral. It looks pretty spectacular from the air with aqua blue water surrounding the entire island. It’s almost like Disneyland for the underwater world

programme.title: Essence Of India
programme.desc: Samira is in New York, getting ready for an exciting trip back home to India, where she re-visits Indian cuisine with her New York culinary trained eye. She packs her bags and sets off. New York’s signature street food is the hot dog. In India, street food is a highly developed cuisine all on its own, going back hundreds of years. Samira has her own take on the shammi kabab and turns them into mini burgers in her kitchen, before traipsing all over New Delhi in her Essence of India auto rickshaw devouring the hearty Samosa, the succulent Kathi wraps, the moorishly moist Biryanis and even ends up taking over a street cart with a smorgasbord of sweet, tangy and spicy Indian chaat.

programme.title: Summer In The Black Forest
programme.desc: Continuing her journey through the Black Forest, Liu has to catch and forage for her dinner, and has a wine tasting in a cellar where they used to hold witch trials.

programme.title: The Boat Show
programme.desc: Luxury sailing, power boats, water sports and a nautical lifestyle. This show is for anyone who dreams of owning a vboat, of a life aboard ship, of beautiful people and places, and super yachts.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: This ancient city, once threatened by the teeth of modern development, stands proud as one of China’s defining economical centers, and one of the few to retain their original visage. The institutions honed and developed in this ancient city have long been lost, but the city’s remarkable architecture and history remain very much intact. The pioneers of the Chinese financial system came from this city, making their marks in every corner of the country. Their influence swelled well beyond the thick city walls, leaving behind an impressive legacy of commerce, finance and business. Discover China, as we unlock the vault containing the valuable secrets of Ancient Pingyao.

programme.title: Amazing Spa Towns Of Europe
programme.desc: Ellen’s final day in the Czech Republic sees her learning a lot about mud. She also releases a bird back to the wild, visits an aquapark, and quickly regrets sticking her head down a hole in the ground!

programme.title: It's More Fun in the Philippines
programme.desc: As their tour continues, Liü is enticed into a rooftop dance, and Mel has to face her fear of heights. After a sunset river trip, the pair set out on an island-hopping day to the idyllic Selfie Island.

programme.title: Our New Zealand Escape
programme.desc: Petra Bagust and Hamish Wilson travel to Rotorua for an energetic weekend break and raft down the world’s largest commercial waterfall.

programme.title: Into Water & Beyond
programme.desc: Queenstown in alive all year round, from adventure and adrenalin activities to everything outdoors - this place has got it all…

programme.title: Essence Of India
programme.desc: The whole world loves a good curry, and living in New York, Samira loves to make curries, Indian, South East Asian and the Western stew, but she heads back to India where she learns how to make some of India’s finest curries. Here is the story of ultimate deliciousness -- the tale of the curry. The desire to perfect her skills, sets her off on a curry trail, seeking out the best chefs in Delhi and getting them to spill their secrets. This episode travels through the kitchens of master chefs, who created the king of all curries, The Butter Chicken, reintroduces the authentic korma, a recipe that has been tweaked across the globe and tells the story of the Raja Mirch, the hottest pepper in the world.

programme.title: Summer In The Black Forest
programme.desc: After visiting a castle square with no castle, Liu's journey concludes in the city of Karlsruhe, where she is a guest on the Royal Palace balcony, and visits a museum where the trees sing to her!

programme.title: The Boat Show
programme.desc: Luxury sailing, power boats, water sports and a nautical lifestyle. This show is for anyone who dreams of owning a vboat, of a life aboard ship, of beautiful people and places, and super yachts.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: A forbidden city that was built hundreds of miles away from the capital in Beijing, still stands today on the hills and crests of this mountain, its peak serves as a ladder to heaven. The mysteries of this now deserted structure, which served both a ruler and a deity, are slowly being revealed. Wudang Mountain stands, aloof, veiled in mysterious tales of ancient gods and rich in imperial history. Its ridges stretch, shrouded with clouds and mist all year round. Discover China brings you the Mystery of XuanWu, a riveting tale of the bond between an emperor and a god, the link between man and nature, and the story behind WuDang Mountain, and its mystifying peaks.

programme.title: A Wing & A Prayer
programme.desc: Mark Oremland had a a dream - to fly a DC-3 from England to Nerw Zealand, recreting the famous 1936 flight by Jean Bastten - the first person to fly that route.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Once-magnificent beacons, now in ruins, mark the Great Wall's origins. Their legend intertwines with one who bridged two warring kingdoms.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Shark Gordon's off to the Sea of Cortez to after his next quarry. Dive in and see the wonder of an underwater mountain as Gordon and his crew scour it for the elusive schools of hammerheads.

programme.title: The Water Dancers
programme.desc: Dragonflies are the sentinels of the Earth. Being among the oldest creatures on our planet, they have lived in harmony with the indigenous plants and animals of Earth’s bountiful landscapes for 300 million years. We came, we conquered and we evicted them from their habitats. Now, after millennia of human recklessness, we are turning back to nature’s messenger, the dragonfly, for promise of a new way forward. South Africa’s scientists and industries are working to bring them back into our world through a creative system of connected corridors, known as Ecological Networks. The Water Dancers, a name from the Zulu Jigamanzi, “dancing on water,” invites you into the precious world of the small things to discover how their sensitive nature can help us design a passage into the future.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: The Time of Their Lives
programme.desc: The ultimate coming-of-age movie. With a combined age of almost 300, Hetty, Rose and Alison love to share their concerns on everything from terrorism and global warming to sex, death and the meaning of life. The Time of Their Lives reveals the everyday mystery of how very old people experience life and the intense challenges that old age brings. Like first-hand witnesses reporting back from the edge of their own mortality, Hetty, Rose and Alison tell us things which are never spoken of.

programme.title: Step By Step
programme.desc: "Post-war, a Ukrainian couple and displaced family train as deminers amid invasion, their two-year journey a testament to resilience."

programme.title: Attention: Artist in Motion
programme.desc: A documentary spotlighting Buenos Aires artist Milo Lockett and his creative journey.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Once-magnificent beacons, now in ruins, mark the Great Wall's origins. Their legend intertwines with one who bridged two warring kingdoms.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Shark Gordon's off to the Sea of Cortez to after his next quarry. Dive in and see the wonder of an underwater mountain as Gordon and his crew scour it for the elusive schools of hammerheads.

programme.title: The Water Dancers
programme.desc: Dragonflies are the sentinels of the Earth. Being among the oldest creatures on our planet, they have lived in harmony with the indigenous plants and animals of Earth’s bountiful landscapes for 300 million years. We came, we conquered and we evicted them from their habitats. Now, after millennia of human recklessness, we are turning back to nature’s messenger, the dragonfly, for promise of a new way forward. South Africa’s scientists and industries are working to bring them back into our world through a creative system of connected corridors, known as Ecological Networks. The Water Dancers, a name from the Zulu Jigamanzi, “dancing on water,” invites you into the precious world of the small things to discover how their sensitive nature can help us design a passage into the future.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Qin Shi Huang, founder of Qin dynasty & first emperor of unified China. From 247–221 BC, he was Zheng, King of Qin.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Perseverance
programme.desc: Dimitri is Fish Captain in Trouville-sur-Mer, Normandy. accompanied with his deckhands, Joris and Omar, embarked on a trawler, they track fishes… Far from their families from Monday to Friday, in the harshness of the job, they face the whims of the sea. Welcome aboard of “La Persévérance

programme.title: Two Kids a Day
programme.desc: Israel jails kids to silence resistant families. A film shows the system: nightly arrests terrorize villages, coerce child informants, and crush solidarity. The state censors this truth.

programme.title: John Mortimer: A Life In Words
programme.desc: Sir John Mortimer: barrister, writer, libertarian. Defended Oz magazine, won the Sex Pistols' "Bollocks" case. Lifelong critic of politicians curtailing liberties—and fun.

programme.title: The Reluctant Revolutionary
programme.desc: Saleh ruled 45 years; ousted by revolution. This film chronicles that year through Kais, a tour guide turned reluctant revolutionary. Director McAllister, the last Western journalist, captures the distortion of conflict.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: On Tai Mountain, a shrine honors a humble girl turned goddess—now worshipped as supreme ruler of the sacred peak.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Because of its isolated habitat, little is known about the Galapagos Shark and its behaviors. And that's enough to get Shark Gordon interested, catching and tagging a group of the sharks to help…

programme.title: Delay of Game
programme.desc: Delay Of Game is a moving film that tackles the lives of the football coaches, football players and football families. The film also takes a hard look at the troubling death of former NFL superstar and Hall of Famer Junior Seau who was found to have the crippling disease (CTE - chronic traumatic encephalopathy). The fate of the game is uncertain. Legislatures banning youth football have begun to arise, and fewer participants are signing up to play each year. The game continue to change due to growing health concerns over it long-term effects.

programme.title: Apollo 8 Christmas At The Moon
programme.desc: This one hour documentary profiles the first manned Mission to the Moon, and includes interviews with the astronauts and many of the NASA officials who were a part of this historic event.

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Dogs
programme.desc: A canine-crazed world: lawn crappers, a pelican-hunted Chihuahua, cross-dressing Boris, and dubber-loving Fugly. Where dogs just want to be dogs, and owners want them to be people.

programme.title: I am Breathing
programme.desc: Neil Platt, 33, films his decline from ALS—the disease that killed his father. A stark chronicle for awareness, it’s ultimately a love letter to his wife, infant son, and life itself.

programme.desc: In Songpan’s ponds and caves, ancient traditions live for centuries, passed through generations as time flies away.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Shark Gordon is called upon to do something that has never been accomplished successfully: tag a fully-grown whale shark. Will he be able to pull off attaching a tag to one of these massive animals?

programme.title: The Claustrophiles
programme.desc: This film about caving is not meant for cavers. It was made forall those people who stay outside and ask questions such as: " How can you breathe? ", “Aren’t you afraid of being trapped there?" "But...what do you do in there?" Speleology films often talk about the caves. But they rarely talk about speleologists. Who are these strange people who live unlike others?

programme.title: The Nive Lives of Alice Mortimer
programme.desc: Born ’72. Cystic fibrosis. Refused to compromise. Filmed before her tragic 2003 death, her ambition defied fate.

programme.title: Art Interrupted
programme.desc: In 2012, Kochi, Kerala launched Asia’s biggest contemporary art show. Filmmaker Hattie Bowering follows artists battling no power, dengue, heat, and labor issues to open the historic Kochi-Muziris Biennale. A rare, refreshing look inside the artistic process.

programme.title: First Contact
programme.desc: First contact: 1930, New Guinea. The Leahy brothers filmed their clash with indigenous peoples, who thought them sun-bleached ancestors. Fifty years later, survivors see the footage, recalling the hope and darkness that followed.

programme.title: Discover China
programme.desc: Dazu Rock Carvings: Chinese religious sculptures in Chongqing, dating to the 7th century AD.

programme.title: Stepping Out
programme.desc: China is usually seen through the lens of economics, politics and a regimented population. But in Stepping Out we meet people who have left home and set out on the road to discover their China and themselves. Su Min, who feels she has done her duty as daughter, wife, mother and grandmother and in her 50’s left her abusive husband; Kiwi, a two-year-old whose parents lost their jobs in the pandemic and not owning a house, travel China in their RV as a family; and Alex a graphic designer exploring his country with his retired mother. Through their travels and their lives, we see a different life in China – a freedom to travel, explore, visit amazing places but taking all the benefits of technology to promote themselves and make a living. The film was made in July 2022 by students from CUC Nanjing and is directed by their tutor.

programme.title: I Love St Lucia
programme.desc: Discover the magic of the Caribbean island of St Lucia with Leee John from Imagination. Together we visit the Piton Mountains, the Sulphur Springs, and the island's music festivals. Includes an exclusive interview withthe Prime Minister.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: A British intelligence operative falls out with his superiors and is framed for a murder.

programme.title: The Nip Tuck Trip
programme.desc: Why do we spend more time, money and effort tryingto keep up appearances than at any other time inhistory? Are we obsessed? Or are we just trying to fitin? Follow women on a cosmetic surgery holiday toKuala Lumpur, and find out why they go to such greatlengths to alter their looks.

programme.title: Cutting Barking
programme.desc: Isaacs and editor Charap reveal the creative conflicts in shaping their documentary, as subject agendas steer the film's narrative.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: From microscopic single celled organisms to the largest animals on the planet, one goal is shared by all living things: to reproduce.

programme.title: World of the Wild E3
programme.desc: One of the seven wonders of the natural world, the Great Barrier Reef is an exceptional marine ecosystem, brimming with an array of uniquely adapted life-forms.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: On this episode of Animal Super Senses, we get in touch with the feelings of wild animals. Really in touch. Because animals, just like humans, rely heavily on their sense of touch, every day in every way. There may be a fine line between pleasure and pain, but not knowing the difference between the two can be absolutely fatal.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: From rams to lizards, many animals rely on direct body-to-body combat. This episode uncovers headbutts, wrestling, and full-on melees in the natural world.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: In the wild, survival is a fight. Whether it’s aggression… defense… or avoidance… the strategies of that fight are known as agonism.

programme.title: World of the Wild E4
programme.desc: Remaining as one of the last and most extensive areas of wilderness on the planet, in the forbidding Arctic only the most hardy and resourceful creatures can survive.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: On this episode of Animal Super Senses, we examine how things taste, and how vital scent is from the animal perspective. But their sense of smell will also detect the scent of odorants carried through the air. In mammals, taste receptor cells are scattered over the tongue. In other creatures, they can be located in some fairly odd places. How taste and smell receptors work underwater, well, it's a whole other world.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Giants of San Benedicto” features Dr. Robert Rubin and his ground-breaking research of giant Mantas. You'll travel to the remote Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast and see breath-taking encounters with enormous manta rays.

programme.desc: On this episode of Animal Super Senses, we examine how things taste, and how vital scent is from the animal perspective. But their sense of smell will also detect the scent of odorants carried through the air. In mammals, taste receptor cells are scattered over the tongue. In other creatures, they can be located in some fairly odd places. How taste and smell receptors work underwater, well, it's a whole other world.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Giants of San Benedicto” features Dr. Robert Rubin and his ground-breaking research of giant Mantas. You'll travel to the remote Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast and see breath-taking encounters with enormous manta rays.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: In the wild, survival is a fight. Whether it’s aggression… defense… or avoidance… the strategies of that fight are known as agonism.

programme.title: World of the Wild E4
programme.desc: Remaining as one of the last and most extensive areas of wilderness on the planet, in the forbidding Arctic only the most hardy and resourceful creatures can survive.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: A predator’s strategies must be superior to its prey’s if they are to win the right to feed and live another day in the unforgiving wild.

programme.title: World of the Wild E5
programme.desc: A unique grassland environment formed in the rain shadow of a massive mountain range, the prairie is home to some of North America’s most iconic wildlife.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There are senses we share with most animals, but what about those senses that human is equipped with? Infrared light, electromagnetic waves and ultrasound, are all found within a spectrum of sensory information that just passes by ordinary humans. This episode is all about those ‘super human’ senses – animal sensory systems that can detect magnetic fields (magneto- reception), electric fields (electroreception) and infrared radiation.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: Animals have evolved stunning camouflage and mimicry to avoid predators or deceive prey. From leafy seadragons to owls, this episode reveals nature’s top illusionists.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: Animals have evolved stunning camouflage and mimicry to avoid predators or deceive prey. From leafy seadragons to owls, this episode reveals nature’s top illusionists.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: From armored bodies, to feisty attitudes, to outright deception… there is only one rule to defense: do whatever it takes to survive the wild.

programme.title: World of the Wild E6
programme.desc: Home to an extraordinary biodiversity, the jungles of Asia are among the most ancient rainforests on Earth – they are also among the planet’s most rapidly disappearing habitats.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There’s a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. And yet, while it’s widely known that, for example, a dog’s sense of smell is dozens of times more acute than humans’, or that goats have close on a 360 degree field of vision, there’s a kind of “sixth sense” that some animals have which still defies explanation. Call it extra-sensory perception – animal abilities we can’t entirely explain but which leave us wondering - and in awe.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Tentacles” follows Dr. Jennifer Mather as she leads a team of renowned scientists to the beautiful Caribbean Island of Bonaire. Their mission is to prove a controversial theory: reef squid speak to each other with a complex language they paint on their skin.

programme.title: World of the Wild E7
programme.desc: The defining environment of our planet, the open ocean remains a largely unexplored world filled with mystery – and so too is the life that it harbors.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this episode, we examine how every animal has what could be called a sense of rhythm – the human animal included. To give an obvious example, there’s our internal body clock which responds to the so-called Circadian rhythm. That’s the 24 hour night and day cycle.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: From venomous snakes to deadly fish, some animals have evolved chemical weapons to hunt or defend. This episode dives into the biology behind lethal toxins in the wild.

programme.desc: 塞斯梅耶斯深夜秀由艾美獎得主洛恩米高斯監製,邀請一線紅星作嘉賓,還有難忘的喜劇和最棒的音樂人.

programme.title: 吉米法倫今夜秀 13 # 122
programme.desc: 艾美獎及格林美獎得主兼喜劇演員吉米法倫以好客的訪問風格,觀眾投入度,精準的模仿和創新的短劇,將他獨特的高能爆笑喜劇引進NBC的60年傳奇系列.

programme.title: 失憶醫生: 由你掌握 # 8
programme.desc: 為了再度成為父親,並幫助卡露蓮娜康復,安治阿開始再次追求阿尼絲.以莉莎和李卡度必須應付一位有抱負的太空人,而加比額爾有嚴重的頭痛.

programme.title: 失憶醫生: 由你掌握 # 9
programme.desc: 安治阿確信自己終於贏得了阿尼絲的芳心,並試圖在病房幫一位病危病人舉辦婚禮.加比額爾提出一個意想不到的提議,打破實習醫生團隊的平衡.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 5 # 8
programme.desc: 李大衛意識到戴雁正考慮離開律師樓,他告訴她和麗茲自己絕不允許這決定.祖利兀士惹上了瓦克拿法官.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 5 # 9
programme.desc: 李大衛反對聘用阿勒瓜.警方知道了瓦克拿法官的法庭,並傾向將他們的犯人送到他的法庭.奧斯卡李飛簽署一項向大麻藥房供應大麻的協議.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 5 # 10
programme.desc: 瑪莉莎在雲莉塔的法庭上為馬堤奧努力辯護,而戴雁則嘗試找他訪談;麗茲和阿勒瓜為毒販奧斯卡李飛辯護.

programme.title: 特務 1
programme.desc: 這是對約瑟夫康拉德關於恐怖主義,間諜活動和背叛的經典小說爆炸性和令人心碎的改編.

programme.title: 蒙面歌王 英國版 7 # 2
programme.desc: 這是有史以來揭曉人數最多的一次!12 位重量級巨星將隱藏身分同台競技,更有 2 位巨星領軍全新的蒙面專屬樂團.今晚將有 2 位參賽者揭曉身分,讓我們一起屏息以待:面具背後的到底是誰?

programme.title: 吉米法倫今夜秀 13 # 123
programme.desc: 艾美獎及格林美獎得主兼喜劇演員吉米法倫以好客的訪問風格,觀眾投入度,精準的模仿和創新的短劇,將他獨特的高能爆笑喜劇引進NBC的60年傳奇系列.

programme.title: 塞斯梅耶斯深夜秀 13 # 103
programme.desc: 塞斯梅耶斯深夜秀由艾美獎得主洛恩米高斯監製,邀請一線紅星作嘉賓,還有難忘的喜劇和最棒的音樂人.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 5 # 9
programme.desc: 李大衛反對聘用阿勒瓜.警方知道了瓦克拿法官的法庭,並傾向將他們的犯人送到他的法庭.奧斯卡李飛簽署一項向大麻藥房供應大麻的協議.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 5 # 10
programme.desc: 瑪莉莎在雲莉塔的法庭上為馬堤奧努力辯護,而戴雁則嘗試找他訪談;麗茲和阿勒瓜為毒販奧斯卡李飛辯護.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 6 # 1
programme.desc: 在晉升為律師樓高級合夥人後,麗茲被逼接受連利查成為新的冠名合夥人,幫助管理她員工和客戶的重擔.同時,黛雁經歷似曾相識感.

programme.title: 傲骨之戰 6 # 2
programme.desc: 黛雁接受她的首次治療,開始以積極的眼光看待一切.

programme.title: 特務 2
programme.desc: 這是對約瑟夫康拉德關於恐怖主義,間諜活動和背叛的經典小說爆炸性和令人心碎的改編.

programme.title: 靈修早晨
programme.desc: 每天早晨透過詩歌安靜心靈,從牧者及嘉賓的分享學習《聖經》中的真理,讓觀眾由淺入深認識信仰,默想《聖經》教導。

programme.title: 來!為這城禱告
programme.desc: 你們要為那城求平安,為那城禱告耶和華;因為那城得平安,你們也隨著得平安。(耶29:7)

programme.title: 地球大神祕
programme.desc: 從世界各地蒐集到數以百計奇異事物內容,都是無法以一般人接受的觀點加以解釋,除非這個世界在科學理論上有「超自然」的存在!

programme.title: 你是主角
programme.desc: 有人說,人生是一場戲,在人生的過程中,尋找有時、碰壁有時、迷失有時、覺醒有時,說真的,這些起承轉合比真正的電影情節更精彩,每一個「你」,都是天父特別設計的人生劇本主角。 今天,我們的世界充滿了末世風情,醉生夢死、迷失自我了結生命的悲劇每天上演,創世電視藉100個見證故事挽救生命,100位來自世界各地..

programme.title: 如果還有明天5 我為上帝精彩過
programme.desc: 在人生旅途中走歪路、下錯車,弄得滿身傷痕、萬劫不復,惟有祂並不介意我們的過去,願意領我們走向美好的將來。《如果還有明天5我為上帝精彩過》,深入中國廣西山區孤兒院,記錄殘障青年在信仰中找回尊嚴和盼望的故事。攝製隊再遠赴南半球,見證澳洲天生失明女歌手及輪椅上的媽媽,突破身體局限活出主愛無限;還有美國摘冠..

programme.title: 主日講壇-中國基督教播道會同福堂
programme.desc: 中國基督教播道會同福堂 講題:被神翻轉的生命:約瑟的眼淚 人每一天都要面對很多抉擇,要將上帝的智慧應用在生活不同層面中是一件不容易的事情,而在牧師和傳道人的講道中,往往都能夠得到啟迪。透過主日講壇,更明白神的道並在生活中尋求到神喜悅的心意。

programme.title: 馮秉誠牧師-信仰科學人生
喜樂婆婆會客室
programme.desc: 主持小金子喬媽,人稱「喜樂婆婆」,一生經歷操練出一套喜樂心得,她更請來一眾嘉賓好友,分享人生中大小風浪,靠著的是同出一轍的喜樂秘訣,在節目中娓娓道出那份屬天的快樂。

programme.title: 地球深度行IV 鐵証待判
programme.desc: 《地球深度行4之鐵證待判》繼續以遊歷的方式,走進荷蘭、土耳其、約旦、敍利亞,涉及接近50個地點,超過30個已經發生嘅神蹟預言、傳奇故事,以考古和實證,重新解構連科學都不能解釋的千古謎團。 歷年來有無數的考古學家和世界知名的紀錄片頻道,為瞭解開上帝藉著摩西施行神蹟分割紅海這個歷史迷團,他們都不惜花上大..

programme.title: 《天下華人唱出好詩歌大賽》大賽
programme.desc: 由影音使團、香港福音盛會、華福會香港區委會、以勒基金主辦,創世電視首屆「天下華人唱出好詩歌」大賽,冠軍即將誕生。世上最美的聲音,是生命重生的聲音,世上最美的身影,是逆境前行的身影。500位參加者,一年訓練、成長、比併、同行,要成為祝福城市的好聲音。

programme.desc: 有人說,人生是一場戲,在人生的過程中,尋找有時、碰壁有時、迷失有時、覺醒有時,說真的,這些起承轉合比真正的電影情節更精彩,每一個「你」,都是天父特別設計的人生劇本主角。 今天,我們的世界充滿了末世風情,醉生夢死、迷失自我了結生命的悲劇每天上演,創世電視藉100個見證故事挽救生命,100位來自世界各地..

programme.title: 福氣教會講道系列
programme.desc: 如何建立健康強盛的教會? 改變社區可以轉化城市? 作為基督徒,我們又如何盡忠地完成普世宣教使命? 一個「幸福小組」,讓教會續步履行三個使命!由台灣高雄福氣教會牧者主講,從《聖經》的話語開始,一起來學習「幸福」智慧!

programme.title: 劉三論今-風風雨雨牽手情
programme.desc: 聖經上說:「人的怒氣,並不成就神的義」,你怎麼靠著神,在處理夫妻之間的矛盾中經歷得勝?創世電視「信仰生活」系列 《劉三論今》,以聖經觀點來講述婚姻家庭的重要性,加進動畫、話劇、布偶及演奏的不同元素,以接地氣的輕鬆方式來教導我們婚姻家庭的經營。

programme.desc: 文強自小被批為天煞孤星,誤打誤撞地來到方舟展館工作,遇上至潮上帝,少女慈禧、伊甸娃娃、羅馬兵丁、太空人、Indiana Jones等神蹟翻生;惡魔襲擊,文強如何靠著上帝和秘密武器應戰呢?

programme.title: 地球深度行V 大地的寶藏
programme.desc: 攝製隊走訪美國、英國、 瑞士、澳洲、土耳其、以色列、埃及、中國及亞洲等國家,訪尋學者專家多年來從大地發掘的寶藏及科研成果,當中包括高山上經歷大洪水形成的奇異化石;全球首卷手抄絲綢中文聖經;以色列鑄造挪亞方舟金幣場等。一切一切的資料,讓觀眾在欣賞地球的創造同時,見證上帝的奇妙創作及精密設計,從心感受..

programme.desc: 有人說,人生是一場戲,在人生的過程中,尋找有時、碰壁有時、迷失有時、覺醒有時,說真的,這些起承轉合比真正的電影情節更精彩,每一個「你」,都是天父特別設計的人生劇本主角。 今天,我們的世界充滿了末世風情,醉生夢死、迷失自我了結生命的悲劇每天上演,創世電視藉100個見證故事挽救生命,100位來自世界各地..

programme.title: 如果還有明天5 我為上帝精彩過
programme.desc: 在人生旅途中走歪路、下錯車,弄得滿身傷痕、萬劫不復,惟有祂並不介意我們的過去,願意領我們走向美好的將來。《如果還有明天5我為上帝精彩過》,深入中國廣西山區孤兒院,記錄殘障青年在信仰中找回尊嚴和盼望的故事。攝製隊再遠赴南半球,見證澳洲天生失明女歌手及輪椅上的媽媽,突破身體局限活出主愛無限;還有美國摘冠..

programme.title: 屬靈教室: 聖經真的如此說嗎?-吳宣倫博士
創世電視復興祭壇
programme.desc: 與影音使團創世電視成為一家人,一起在「創世電視復興祭壇」,以禱告和敬拜守望香港。

programme.title: 屬靈教室:何偉強牧師-羅馬書看信仰生活化的挑戰
programme.desc: 何偉強牧師從羅馬書看基督徒的個人信仰,如何做到「入世而出世」;肢體間如果做到恩賜配搭、彼此相愛,並探討基督徒在社會的參與、生活倫理、奉獻及差傳等等。

programme.title: 屬靈教室: 創世記 -呂沛淵牧師
喜樂婆婆會客室
programme.desc: 主持小金子喬媽,人稱「喜樂婆婆」,一生經歷操練出一套喜樂心得,她更請來一眾嘉賓好友,分享人生中大小風浪,靠著的是同出一轍的喜樂秘訣,在節目中娓娓道出那份屬天的快樂。

programme.title: 地球大神祕
programme.desc: 從世界各地蒐集到數以百計奇異事物內容,都是無法以一般人接受的觀點加以解釋,除非這個世界在科學理論上有「超自然」的存在!

programme.title: 《天下華人唱出好詩歌大賽》大賽
programme.desc: 由影音使團、香港福音盛會、華福會香港區委會、以勒基金主辦,創世電視首屆「天下華人唱出好詩歌」大賽,冠軍即將誕生。世上最美的聲音,是生命重生的聲音,世上最美的身影,是逆境前行的身影。500位參加者,一年訓練、成長、比併、同行,要成為祝福城市的好聲音。

programme.desc: 中國基督教播道會同福堂 講題:被神翻轉的生命:約瑟的眼淚 人每一天都要面對很多抉擇,要將上帝的智慧應用在生活不同層面中是一件不容易的事情,而在牧師和傳道人的講道中,往往都能夠得到啟迪。透過主日講壇,更明白神的道並在生活中尋求到神喜悅的心意。

programme.desc: 常常有人提出一個問題: 「 到底有沒有神? 」 假如有神, 當然應該信靠祂; 假如沒有神, 那就什麽宗教也不需要了. 對於這個問題, 我總是打開《聖經》,請他門看羅馬書一章19-20節。 《聖經》說: 「 神的事情, 人所能知道的, 原顯明在人心裡, 因為神, 神已經給他們顯明. 自從造天地以來, ..

programme.desc: 節目記錄葛培理佈道團最新福音事工,並葛培理牧師70年來佈道的足跡及對世界各地的貢獻,讓我們面對不同的世情,仍然把握機會傳福音。

programme.title: 聖地流動教室-以色列破謎之旅
programme.desc: 通曉中西方歷史、文學、藝術、民間傳說的學者吳宗文牧師,以及主持梁藝齡,透過鏡頭帶著電視觀眾,去到聖地各站遊歷,呈現出新舊約的《聖經》典故、歷史文獻的記載、相關的猶太傳說和傳統習俗,而更重要是從耶穌和初期信徒的記載,帶出人生的重要特質,助你成就非凡人生。

programme.desc: 節目按不同主題,包括..職場、家庭、戀愛、情緒、信仰生命,邀請七位牧者從《聖經》經文結合生活例子與大家一同靈修,建立一個不離地的信徒生命。

programme.title: 靈修早晨
programme.desc: 每天早晨透過詩歌安靜心靈,從牧者及嘉賓的分享學習《聖經》中的真理,讓觀眾由淺入深認識信仰,默想《聖經》教導。

programme.title: 來!為這城禱告
programme.desc: 你們要為那城求平安,為那城禱告耶和華;因為那城得平安,你們也隨著得平安。(耶29:7)

programme.title: 聖地流動教室-以色列破謎之旅
programme.desc: 通曉中西方歷史、文學、藝術、民間傳說的學者吳宗文牧師,以及主持梁藝齡,透過鏡頭帶著電視觀眾,去到聖地各站遊歷,呈現出新舊約的《聖經》典故、歷史文獻的記載、相關的猶太傳說和傳統習俗,而更重要是從耶穌和初期信徒的記載,帶出人生的重要特質,助你成就非凡人生。

programme.title: 「創世電視福音主日」-中華文明起源重溯與聖經創世記的關係
programme.desc: 「超闊銀幕震撼影像」遇上「意想不到又大眾化的福音主題」,加上「誠意的款待」會產生極致的「福音體驗」

programme.title: 生活圈
programme.desc: 《生活圈》欄目全方位展現新時期中國人民的“新健康、新消費、新科技、新文化、新時尚,以社會主義核心價值觀為引領,通過甄別媒體環境中與日常生活相關的各類資訊,引導觀眾掌握生活技巧、領悟生活智慧,宣導健康的生活方式和積極的生活態度。

programme.title: 今日説法
programme.desc: 《今日說法》是一檔日播法治欄目,秉持“點滴記錄中國法治進程的理念,以“重在普法,監督執法,促進立法、服務百姓為宗旨,採用“以案說法、大眾參與、專家點評的節目樣式進行普法宣傳,被譽“中國人的法制午餐。節目前半部分呈現記者深入基層採訪的真實案例,後半部分由演播室中的主持人和嘉賓對節目進行點評,體現節目品質和社會價值。

programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. I want to see my owner again! Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-13.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Japans plastic models are popular worldwide. Shizuoka City leads the nation in plastic model shipments. We look at the citys plastic model industry, from its history to the latest developments.

programme.title: A Cats-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Kojiro lives in a nashi pear orchard and is good at climbing trees. Warawara lives in the mountains and is friends with dogs. She plays with them on shared walks before napping together.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Through the Kitchen Window
programme.desc: The Sakura shrimp is a rare delicacy caught at just one port in Japan. The locals want to ensure it can be enjoyed for years to come.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.desc: The Maki-e lacquering technique uses gold dust on a jet-black background to dazzling effect.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Today: making small talk with a client. Raphael Marso, from Germany, works at a company that makes manufacturing equipment. He takes on a roleplay challenge to help improve his Japanese skills.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Abashiri is known for drift ice. Local Glass artisan Gunji Noboru uses recycled fluorescent bulbs to make eco-friendly art inspired by the natural environment while striving to reduce his energy use.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE

programme.title: Searching for the Japanese Midwife
programme.desc: Chinese journalist Kou Aizhe spent 14 years searching for a Japanese midwife who delivered 10,000 infants in postwar China, with him among them. His work uncovered the tragic past of the heroic woman.

programme.title: 香港早晨[粵] 及 交通消息[粵]
香港早晨[粵] 及 交通消息[粵]
香港早晨[粵] 及 交通消息[粵]
高朋滿座#127[粵]
programme.desc: 眾人遇上多宗喜事，擔心是暴風雨前夕。露台突傳出巨響，樓上空置的單位突然有物件擲下，原來是有新房客遷入該址。新搬來的婆婆對眾人稱自己常遭虐待。眾人在藥房談論此事，但花聽後卻起了疑心，於是決定展開偵查。

programme.title: 命轉皇后#2[粵/普][PG]
programme.desc: 雪寧到尤府想找回前世的貼身宮女芳吟，發現她被家人壓制，雪寧奮不顧身營救。有刺客想刺殺謝危，雪寧剛好來到而被挾持，雪寧以為謝危想殺她。花燈會上，燕臨提到自己快將加冠，讓雪寧想起前世冠禮的情況而傷心落淚…

programme.title: 食平D[粵]
programme.desc: 平民價煮出鵝肝味道，肥媽會以甚麼代替？芒果龍脷卷又會創出甚麼驚喜？怎樣煮出香滑的海鮮湯？她還傳授以平價錢吸收到可媲美大海魚的骨膠原。「大廚平煮」有黃君師傅示範賣相媲美一束鮮花的「囍愛嚐花」。

programme.title: 澳門「休」遊攻略[粵]
programme.desc: 喜歡前往澳門遊玩，但卻懶得規劃行程？相關巴士資訊網頁、澳門旅遊吉祥物「麥麥」帶路，讓「仙氣」女主持Rosita(郭柏妍)、游游(游嘉欣)輕鬆發掘當地的吃喝玩樂熱點，要「躺平」遊澳門，無問題！

programme.title: 流行都市[粵]
programme.desc: 中醫學有句說話「久視傷血」，長期看屏幕、熬夜、飲食燥熱都可能是乾眼症的根源問題，而五臟六腑亦會將津液送到眼睛。醫師細談不同證型的症狀，並帶來有助改善乾眼症的穴位和茶飲建議。香港現行與棄養相關的法例未涉及爬蟲類、魚類，有心人見此特意創辦主力拯救被棄養烏龜的團體。他會述說救龜經歷，以及之後的處理程序，長遠盼望向社區推廣生命教育。「睇餸食飯」，傅季馨炮製酸甜菜式「西檸雞」，雞肉沾粉兩次又炸兩次有何作用？

programme.title: 早D知早D醫[粵]
programme.desc: 曾參加《中年好聲音2》的陳寶雄試過糖尿上眼，自揭曾日飲七罐汽水，並藉訪談釐清不少人對糖尿病患者在飲食、醫療方面的誤解。另邊廂，永城請到內科醫生介紹兩款新型藥物。此外，如小便量多、易口渴、體重驟降，都是患糖尿病的先兆。糖尿病人要注意飲食，焗豬扒飯可免則免，營養師提議替代品，並簡述如何根據食品的升糖指數而控制血糖；中醫角度，則有茶療可降血糖。也有適合糖尿病人的運動動作，留意物理治療師與主持的示範。

programme.title: 原來愛上賊#9[粵][PG]
programme.desc: 高哲佈局令君豪送上珠寶展的保安佈陣。君豪在珠寶展見到美莉，驚為天人，邀請她做模特兒，江揚卻指君豪有問題，夫妻不歡而散。結果美莉弄傷盤骨，江揚抱她去醫院而關了手機，此時高哲出動變聲器扮江揚，支開大海等人。之後譚彬播出假畫面，蒙騙保安室內的江翹，高哲、關仁及明翔以催眠氣體弄暈警衛，把握紅外線保安被關上的五分鐘行事時，發現珠寶飾櫃的密碼被改。江揚趕到現場，發現「宇宙之星」仍在，卻多了「善有善報」四字。

programme.title: Kiki & Nuna 知識寶庫[粵/普]
programme.desc: 在小鎮上生活著六個小朋友，在他們的日常生活中，會遇到形形色色的問題，有朋友之間的情感問題，有生活中的安全問題，有待人處事的行為規範，美妙世界的科學原理...

programme.title: Hands Up[粵]
programme.desc: 熟悉合氣道的教練繼續執掌「WORKOUT 2GETHER」，讓大家動起來。要做好第一套「下肢協調訓練」，先要學識手部「上擋」，教練以「探熱」來形容此姿勢，眾人即可明白。第二套「反應及速度訓練」亦相若，卻以「中擋」代替「上擋」，另一隻手則做出「貓抓」的動作就可以。雙手輪流交換做，做熟後加入向前走、向後走的元素，甚或交替揮拳和上擋或中擋，就能完成兩節練習。另會播放AI生成動畫《富翁和鞋匠》的下半部份。

programme.title: 皇家少女樂團[粵/日]
programme.desc: 阿源開始拍攝烹飪影片，處處碰壁。阿燎和流星來到現場，被奈津反問三人為何如此熟絡。邪音魔來襲，為免引起奈津懷疑，奈比由趁亂引開奈津，讓公主三人能順利變身與邪音魔交戰。

programme.title: 財經新聞[粵]
programme.desc: 緊貼市況，逢交易日下午5時50分報道當日本港和外圍股市行情，以及重點財經新聞。

programme.title: 新界鄉議局一百周年呈獻：保家衛國 薪火相傳[粵]
programme.desc: 中日甲午戰爭之後，列強意圖進一步瓜分中國領土，英國政府在1898與滿清政府簽署不平等的《展拓香港界址專條》，強行租借「新九龍」和「新界」，翌年1899年，新界原居民保衛家園，發生影響深遠的戰役「新界六日戰爭」。新界鄉議局一直致力保障新界原居民的合法傳統權益，今年踏入100周年紀念，如何在基本法的保障下，享有新界原居民的合法傳統權益。「新界鄉議局百周年紀念呈獻，保家衛國，薪火相傳」，詳細介紹。

programme.title: 六點半新聞報道[粵]
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六點半，報道本地、兩岸及國際重要新聞。

programme.title: 農本方參苓白朮散呈獻:天氣報告[粵] 及 滙豐Premier Elite呈獻：《滙豐Premier Elite財富滙談》[粵]
澳門「休」遊攻略[粵]
programme.desc: 喜歡前往澳門遊玩，但卻懶得規劃行程？相關巴士資訊網頁、澳門旅遊吉祥物「麥麥」帶路，讓「仙氣」女主持Rosita(郭柏妍)、游游(游嘉欣)輕鬆發掘當地的吃喝玩樂熱點，要「躺平」遊澳門，無問題！

programme.title: 東張西望[粵]
programme.desc: 《東張西望》星期一至日，緊貼追蹤社會大事、趣聞逸事，並報道娛樂圈最新動態、藝人消息，以及劇集宣傳和花絮。「今日突發」環節為大家追蹤即日熱門新聞；專題環節，深入探討大眾關心的時事、社會及民生問題，並訪問相關的專家。

programme.title: 黃道益活絡油呈獻：愛． 回家之開心速遞#2837[粵] 及 保誠精選「寵愛寶」呈獻：社畜求生101[粵]
programme.desc: 璟風成功併購某大超市，立下大功。敢威欲進軍航運界，安排璟風代他登上郵輪，與航運集團主席洽談生意；璟風提出若洽談成功，敢威要與他及瑞素聚餐，以改善兩人關係，獲敢威答應。璟風登上郵輪後，為見主席經歷重重難關，最終見到的卻是意想不到之人，原來是敢威暗中安排。另一方面，傳媒報道接龍將有大事發生，瑞素得知敢威要利用璟風進行商業大計，而璟風被困郵輪，她必須阻止敢威的計劃，救回璟風，為此作出各種嘗試……

programme.title: 飛常日誌II#9[粵]
programme.desc: 機長啟光帶學員接受海外訓練後，正式返港復職。張穎經過內心掙扎，決定申請調回空服員崗位，重返飛行任務。舒恩被調往停機坪部門跟隨勝祥，迎來截然不同的工作環境……無人駕駛列車在隧道斷電停駛，冷氣系統停止運作，尚偉、啟光、可兒、張穎與多名旅客受困，其中一名老伯更心臟不適。尚偉帶領旅客沿隧道內的通道步行離開，途中老伯的狀況卻突然轉差……與此同時，勝祥要盡快找出內有拯救老伯藥物的寄艙行李，展開一場時間競賽……

programme.title: 中國建設銀行(亞洲)呈獻：走過歷史大地[粵]
programme.desc: 巴黎鐵塔是現代標誌式建築之一，原來當年備受大眾批評？兩主持「加入」建築工程師艾菲爾團隊，一探建塔故事。「開工」後品嚐「工人餐」，工人餐廳裝修奢華，價錢卻相對實惠？二人細味平民美食，還深入廚房向大廚取經。網球運動起源於法國，其前身卻是用手打球？「回到」中世紀時期的修道院，打波兼懺悔，再「檢視」法式網球升呢王室貴族玩意的演變史。難得來到紅土網球場，要與當地網球好手實戰切磋，永城卻投訴隊友翠如「齋企」！

programme.title: 女法醫解密#9[粵/普][PG]
programme.desc: 秦湘被挾持，該人稱孫皓月害死其女，要他償命，秦莞試圖勸說，白非珏卻將其射殺。秦莞去追截懷疑與白非珏私奔的秦湘，途中從客棧老闆處發現線索。秦莞馬上折返，再遇那個被關不能說話的男子，他竟寫下其名為白非珏…

programme.title: 娛樂頭條[粵] 及 環球新聞檔案[粵]
programme.desc: 節目主要以當日的娛樂新聞作重點，讓你瞬間掌握影視娛樂圈動態和最新消息，並以「娛樂大事件」、「搶閘頭條」、「出爐猛料」等為主題作頭條新聞式報道。

programme.title: 晚間新聞[粵]
programme.desc: 報道本地、兩岸、國際重要新聞以及體育消息，讓你洞悉各地大事及體壇動向。

programme.title: 農本方參苓白朮散呈獻:天氣報告[粵]
獵鷹#7[粵]
programme.desc: 陳水從泰國偷渡返港，游說一帆再做毒品買賣，一帆不敢貿然冒險，著陳水先行料理夜總會業務，但陳水到泰國後，夜總會一直由周祥旺打理，二人起衝突。康華辦個人畫展，巧遇大偉與嘉琦，康華對大偉視若無睹，大偉失望。大偉掃蕩非法賭檔，不聽戚幹提點，致打草驚蛇。戚幹到江霞家中吃飯，被其兄弟姊妹上下打量感尷尬。嘉琦弟阿昇欲投考警察幫補家計，但嘉琦希望弟弟唸醫科，遂請大偉當說客，大偉見阿昇志氣可嘉，反表贊同，嘉琦氣結。

programme.title: 香港早晨[粵] 及 交通消息[粵]
香港早晨[粵] 及 交通消息[粵]
香港早晨[粵] 及 交通消息[粵]
高朋滿座#128[粵]
programme.desc: 情夢見化身成超級特工，醒後卻只處理瑣事。根訛稱自己是特務，收情為見習特務。可是，蘇根的所謂的「任務」，是要有情到後樓梯偷報紙，以及替蘇根打理家務。根更要情排隊換禮品，但因不良少女出現打翻蘇根如意算盤。

programme.title: 命轉皇后#3[粵/普][PG]
programme.desc: 雪寧列入芷衣伴讀名單，孟氏氣憤。薛遠欲給燕家偽造罪證，周寅之成功接近燕臨，雪寧猜到前世燕家慘案與寅之有關，提醒他別牽涉燕薛兩家之爭。雪寧在伴讀考試故意亂寫以求落選，不料謝危留她成為伴讀，她折返找謝危…

programme.title: 交易現場[粵] 及 潮流生活誌之北上睇真D[粵]
食平D[粵]
programme.desc: 肥媽以菜心加上少許蝦乾和冬菇，煮出菜飯。剩下的菜心，配上蝦殼、冬瓜，煮成蝦上湯浸冬瓜粒。菜心還有妙用，肥媽配上水果，變出有助腸道健康的飲品。「大廚平煮」，陳惠文師傅以蓮藕和茄子炸出一道鎮江雙艷。

programme.title: 澳門「休」遊攻略[粵]
programme.desc: 喜歡前往澳門遊玩，但卻懶得規劃行程？相關巴士資訊網頁、澳門旅遊吉祥物「麥麥」帶路，讓「仙氣」女主持Rosita(郭柏妍)、游游(游嘉欣)輕鬆發掘當地的吃喝玩樂熱點，要「躺平」遊澳門，無問題！

programme.title: 滙豐Premier Elite呈獻：《滙豐Premier Elite財富滙談》[粵]
programme.desc: 金融市場瞬息萬變，加上科技發展日新月異，如何影響投資市場？《滙豐Premier Elite財富滙談》，雲集不同行業專家，剖析市場趨勢，講解金融、投資及理財等話題，務求做到深入淺出，聚焦分析不同議題，為大家捕捉市場先機。

programme.title: 流行都市[粵]
programme.desc: 「潰瘍性結腸炎」是炎症性腸病其中一種，腸胃肝臟科醫生指出，腸道微生態改變是誘發因素之一，此症會由直腸開始沿腸道往上蔓延。而治療目標是降低病人的發炎水平，病人務要準時服藥及定期檢查。一些錯誤使用隱形眼鏡的壞習慣，可能增加眼部感染風險，視光師細說正確戴隱形眼鏡的步驟，並需於戴前做好鏡片檢查。眼鏡度數不宜直接轉換成隱形眼鏡度數？戴後亦不宜閉眼小休？「睇餸食飯」，Annie用鯇魚煮出湖北傳統菜「糍粑魚」。

programme.title: 早D知早D醫[粵]
programme.desc: 記性轉差？同一事情問完又問？有可能是認知障礙症先兆。永城接受相關AI系統測試；拍攝眼底影像、驗血，又是如何做到檢測患病風險？醫學院教授從全球調查報告結果，細說大多認知障礙患者的病因，並提出有助預防患病的日常生活錦囊。陳欣健的太太突然離家出走，令他察覺問題嚴重，求診後證實太太患上認知障礙症。病患受苦，照顧者或承受更大壓力，認知障礙協會代表帶來照顧者個案，提醒大家如遇照顧困難，肯揚聲必能找到舒緩出口。

programme.title: 原來愛上賊#10[粵][PG]
programme.desc: 譚彬猜中江翹的新密碼，眾人及時脫身；不取走「宇宙之星」是為免江翹失職，同時亦達成阻止君豪騙保險的目的。江揚過份專注高哲，不知道美莉發現因病難以生育。有司機自揭五年前用車撞傷過江揚師傅，但他卻指江揚師傅當時一身賊人裝束，江揚不肯相信。高哲向江揚呈上其師傅死前的錄音，江揚聽後卻指高哲做假，高哲再拿出相關錄像，兩人糾纏間影片播出，令江揚知道師傅成盜之路。君豪派殺手殺高哲，高哲受槍傷，蓉蓉目擊過程。

programme.title: Kiki & Nuna 知識寶庫[粵/普]
programme.desc: 在小鎮上生活著六個小朋友，在他們的日常生活中，會遇到形形色色的問題，有朋友之間的情感問題，有生活中的安全問題，有待人處事的行為規範，美妙世界的科學原理...

programme.title: Hands Up[粵]
programme.desc: 玲玲姐姐再次出任「Artspiration」的導師，並指導Emily姐姐繪畫葉子上的Q版蝸牛。而這回抽到的指定工具，是牙刷與潔面巾。潔面巾能為蝸牛殼印上獨特花紋，牙刷則可營造獨特的天氣效果，玲玲姐姐會怎樣落筆？「開心SHARE」在家裡最愛做的事，小朋友投稿分享自己喜歡在家練習編織、跳舞，也有孩子喜歡看書、玩陀螺。這亦勾起玲玲姐姐的學生回憶，她坦言自己不愛看書，但曾堅持花上一年時間看完一部武俠小說。

programme.title: 皇家少女樂團[粵/日]
programme.desc: 看到小奈的成功，阿源開始思考如何自已容易緊張的問題，流星推介她嘗試吸動物的氣味。蜜柑為了拯救道場的生意，於是開始研發與功夫融合的舞蹈；她被邪音魔襲擊，幸好阿燎發現邪音魔的弱點並將其打敗。

programme.title: 財經新聞[粵]
programme.desc: 緊貼市況，逢交易日下午5時50分報道當日本港和外圍股市行情，以及重點財經新聞。

programme.title: 利嘉閣地產45 周年真盤源特約：今日有樓睇[粵] 及 潮流生活誌之北上睇真D[粵]
programme.desc: 啟德一個四房單位，以歐式風格作主題，同時透過簡化線條，增添優雅感，效果如何？

programme.title: 六點半新聞報道[粵]
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六點半，報道本地、兩岸及國際重要新聞。
